message:
feat(runtime): add root region admission limits and try_spawn API

Enhance runtime builder with admission control for the root region
and add fallible spawn methods.

builder.rs:
- Add root_region_limits() to set admission limits on root region
- Add clear_root_region_limits() to remove limits
- Add RuntimeHandle::try_spawn() returning Result<JoinHandle, SpawnError>
- Existing spawn() panics on admission failure (unchanged behavior)
- Apply root region limits during runtime initialization

config.rs:
- Add root_region_limits field to RuntimeConfig

state.rs:
- Add set_region_limits() for configuring admission policies
- Improve region management introspection
- Better error handling for admission rejections

mod.rs:
- Export new admission-related types

This enables backpressure at the runtime level by limiting how many
tasks can be spawned into the root region simultaneously.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
